body:
✅ Result — the FREE SKRUSDT short we shared earlier tagged its first target and closed in the green 👇

🔻 SKRUSDT — SHORT (Bitunix · 15m)
ID: SKR-S-20260627
Entry zone 0.00865–0.00872 → TP1 0.00840 ✅

The triangle broke down exactly as mapped: price stalled under descending resistance, lost the rising support, and rolled into the first target — a clean ≈3% move on the short before leverage (your size scales it from there).

Why it worked the boring way: the SL sat at 0.00895, set BEFORE entry. Risk defined first, target second. Not a lucky call — a planned one.

This one was a free sample. In VIP the full call lands first, live, the moment it triggers. ⚠️ One idea that played out — not every setup does. 15m is fast: keep size small and trail your stop.

🎟 Want them live? Free 30-day trial 👉 {{COMMUNITY}}
